name: Micro_Momentum_Volume_Burst
description: An ultra-fast scalping strategy optimized for the highly noisy 1-minute timeframe of the VN30F1M contract. To protect against fakeouts and trading costs, it enforces a 'Filtered Breakout' approach by requiring a structural expansion in both directional momentum (via Williams' %R) and volume activity (via the Chaikin Oscillator). To handle the high frequency of Volume = 0 bars without division errors, it relies strictly on cumulative flow metrics. Exits are executed immediately at the close of the bar whenever micro-momentum stalls or an ultra-tight trailing Donchian boundary is breached.

indicators.name: Chaikin_Osc
indicators.definition: self.feat.adosc(high, low, close, volume, fastperiod=3, slowperiod=10)

formula.exit_logic: Exit Long: (WillR < -50.0) or (close < Micro_Low). Exit Short: (WillR > -50.0) or (close > Micro_High).
